summary: Implemented muted autoplay audio system. Created trackList.ts (static manifest + random no-repeat selection), analyser.ts (source→AnalyserNode→GainNode→destination graph with frequency/time-domain accessors), and player.ts (muted autoplay with graceful fallback, setMuted for user-initiated unmute, auto-advance on track end). Wired initAudio() into main.ts non-blocking so visuals never depend on audio. All 25 audio tests pass, TypeScript compiles cleanly, production build succeeds.
